_comment: Loaded as system-prompt context for the Anthropic call. Encodes the Build Spec's budget rules so the model doesn't have to re-derive them.

derivation_rules.dev_missing: country monthly salary × Studio Size × Dev Time
derivation_rules.art_missing: narrative-heavy genres (RPG/VN/Adventure/Narrative): 25% of dev cost; mechanical genres (Strategy/Roguelike/CardGame/Puzzle): 10%; others: comparables median (fallback 18%)
derivation_rules.loc_missing: $0 if user explicitly indicated English-only; otherwise 7% of production sub-total
derivation_rules.dev_sanity_check: if user-provided Dev & QA deviates >30% from country salary × headcount × dev time, mark provenance='adjusted' and average toward the benchmark

rounding.rule: round total to nearest $5,000; if total > $200,000 round to nearest $10,000

framing_modes.constructive_next_steps: 0-2 user-supplied lines (or 3+ estimated). Flaws should read as ordered next-steps, not criticisms.
framing_modes.partial_with_callouts: 3-4 user-supplied lines. Standard flaws + missing-line callouts.
framing_modes.standard_flaws: 5-6 user-supplied lines. Budget Consistency / Unplanned Expenses / Budget Accuracy.
